            function getCookiesStartingWith(cname) {

                let decodedCookie = decodeURIComponent(document.cookie);

                return decodedCookie.split(';')
                    .map((d) => d.trim())
                    .filter((d) => d.substring(0, cname.length) === cname);
            }

            function isCookiePresent(cname) {

                let cookies = getCookiesStartingWith(cname);

                return (cookies.length > 0);
            }

/*******************************************************
ADS - Sticky Slide
*******************************************************/

.in-sticky-content .ad-zone-inline {
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
        top: 70px !important;
    }
    
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
        top: 75px !important;
    }
}

.adsninja-ad-zone.an-zone.an-zone-sidebar-first {
    margin-top: 10px;
}

/************************************************
Extra Space Hack on Ad DIVs Hack
*************************************************/
.ad-zone-inline {
    font-size: 1px;
    line-height: 1px;
}
.ad-zone-container .ad-zone, .ad-zone-container .ad-zone div iframe {
    margin: 0 auto;
    text-align: center;
}

/************************************************
Background
*************************************************/
.ad-zone-container.adsninja-ad-zone-container-with-set-height:before {
    z-index: 0;
}
.ad-zone-size-container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}
.ad-zone-container.ad-zone-container-background-details-enabled:after {
    z-index: 0;
}

/************************************************
Rail Hide Ads Button
*************************************************/
div.an-rail > div.an-rail-item > div.an-zone-sidebar-rail > a.an-btn-hide-me {
    visibility: hidden !important;
}

/************************************************
Footer
*************************************************/
footer.duet--navigation--footer > div {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
}
div.duet--page-layout--homepage main {
    padding-bottom: 0;
}
body.an-setup-homepage footer.duet--navigation--footer {
    margin-top: -0.75rem;
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-container {
        border-color: #f5f5f5;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-container.adsninja-ad-zone-container-with-set-height:before {
        background-color: #f5f5f5;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-container.ad-zone-container-background-details-enabled:after {
        color: #e8e8e8;
        border-color: white;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-advertising-tag {
        color: #bdbdbd;
        background: #fff;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-container.ad-zone-container-header-header {
        background-color: #f5f5f5;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) and (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-header-sticky-header {
        background: #f2f2f2;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .ad-zone-container-footer-footer {
        background-color: #f2f2f2;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .adsninja-valstream .ad-zone-container:before {
       background-color: #f5f5f5;
   }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .an-btn.an-btn-hide-me {
        background: #e3e3e3;
        border-color: #555555 !important;
        color: #333;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .adsninja-ad-zone:has(.an-btn-hide-me) .ad-zone-container {
        border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e3e3;
        border-top: 1px solid #e3e3e3;
    }
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    .an-btn.an-btn-hide-me {
        background: #e3e3e3;
        border-color: #555555 !important;
        color: #333;
    }
    .article-footer, .an-zone-footer-footer {
        .an-btn.an-btn-hide-me {
            background: #e3e3e3;
        }
    }
}

                    </div><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":0,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":0}.-->
                </div>
            <div class="js-hidden-by-overlay" style="display: none;">  </div><div class="js-hidden-by-overlay" style="display: none;">  </div><div class="content-block-regular"><!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":0}.--><p>There are more than 200 <strong>habitats </strong>in <a href="https://www.polygon.com/pokemon-pokopia/" target="_blank"><em>Pokémon Pokopia</em></a> for your Pokémon to move into, and while some are very simple two-by-two grids of grass or flowers, some of them get pretty complex, needing specific items for them to work. You'll collect habitat hints as you play, pointing you in the right direction to find some Pokémon, but if you need some guidance, we're here to share our <strong>Habitat Dex </strong>with you.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":402,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":402}.-->    <!-- No AdsNinja v10 Client! --><!-- No AdsNinja v10 Client! --><!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":402}.--><p>Below we explain <strong>how habitats work in <em>Pokémon Pokopia</em></strong>, and provide a <strong>list of all the habitats</strong> we can confirm so far.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":116,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":518}.-->    <hr><!-- No AdsNinja v10 Client! --><h2 id="how-habitats-in-pokopia-work">
                        How habitats in Pokopia work
               </h2>
<!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":518}.--><p>You make new habitats in <em>Pokopia</em> by placing together specific flowers, plants, trees, and other furnishings. There are more than 200 unique habitats, some of which are variations of each other. For example, all four of the areas in their game have their own versions of the "tall grass" habitat (the two-by-two grid of grass), using their own types of grass, but these are all considered different habitats.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":407,"tryEarlyInjection":true,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":925}.-->    <!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":true,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":925}.-->

                <p class="adsninja-injected-repeatable-ad-beforebegin">As time passes, Pokémon will appear in built habitats, but <strong>only one Pokémon can live in a habitat at once</strong>. If you want another Pokémon to come from that same habitat, you'll need to make another or move the first Pokémon to a different habitat (or a house).</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":257,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":true,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":182}.-->

<!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":422}.--><p> Based on our testing, <strong>you cannot get doubles of any Pokémon</strong>. (We've rolled more than 200 Pokémon at this point and have never gotten two of the same ones.) If you already found a Pidgey from the "pretty flower bed" habitat, you won't get another Pidgey from any other habitat. This makes it easier to find new Pokémon, as this means the next time a critter shows up in the "pretty flower bed" habitat, you'll get something new.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":428,"tryEarlyInjection":true,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":850}.-->    <!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":true,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":850}.--><p class="adsninja-injected-repeatable-ad-afterend">Some Pokémon are also rarer, as denoted in your Habitat Dex when you hover over the question marks or Pokémon silhouettes. <strong>Rarer Pokémon will take longer to appear</strong>, so you'll need to patiently wait for them to show up.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":218,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":0}.-->

<!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":573}.--><p> There are also a few habitats that require specific locations for specific Pokémon. Many Pokémon will only initially show up if the habitat is built in "Palette Town," the area you can access by heading on the western road from <a href="https://polygon.com/pokemon-pokopia-yawn-up-a-storm-walkthrough-make-it-humid-100-point/" target="_blank">Withered Wasteland</a>.                 <p class="adsninja-injected-repeatable-ad-beforebegin">Similarly, a few Pokémon will only show up in specific weather or time conditions. This mostly just means they'll either show up during daytime or nighttime, or that they'll show up in rain or...anything-but-rain.</p><!-- After Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":213,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":true,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":158}.-->    <hr><!-- No AdsNinja v10 Client! --><h2 id="habitat-dex-and-habitat-list-in-pokopia">

               </h2>
<!-- Before Debug Info: {"nodeCharacterCount":null,"tryEarlyInjection":false,"triedEarlyInjection":false,"limitCharacterCount":1000,"remainingCharacterCount":158}.--><p>Below we list all the habitats we've discovered so far, as well as what <a href="https://polygon.com/pokemon-pokopia-pokedex-list-all-specialty/" target="_blank">Pokémon</a> we can for sure confirm come from them. We are working on discovering more (there's so many!) and we'll update this guide as we find more information.         <script type="module">
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            var queryString = window.location.search || '';
            var keyValPairs = [];
            var params      = {};

            queryString     = queryString.substr(1);
            if (queryString.length)
            {
                keyValPairs = queryString.split('&');
                for (var i = 0; i < keyValPairs.length; i++)
                {
                    var key = keyValPairs[i].split('=')[0];
                    if (!key.length) continue;
                    if (typeof params[key] === 'undefined')
                        params[key] = [];
                    params[key].push(keyValPairs[i].split('=')[1]);
                }

                if (params['view'] !== undefined) {
                    if (params['view'] == "list" || params['view'] == "lista") {
                        valnet_cookie.set("view",params['view']);
                    }
                }

                var campaign = null;
                if (params['utm_source'] !== undefined) {
                    campaign = params['utm_source'];
                }
                if (campaign !== null) {
                    valnet_cookie.set("campaign",campaign);
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
